name: Google Workspace AI (Gemini in Workspace)
arrSource: Alphabet Q1 2026 commentary — Gemini-in-Workspace external AI seats; reconciles with the $1.5B copilot-excluded figure declared by Microsoft for the same cohort.

narrative.claimed: Gemini-in-Workspace AI add-on; bundled in Business/Enterprise tiers
narrative.usage: Strong attach in Workspace base; meaningful seat uplift.
narrative.flags: AI repackaging of existing Workspace SKU. Scored as a trad-SaaS AI seat product, separate from Gemini's frontier model business and from Google Cloud infrastructure revenue.
